transcript: Speaker A: English kathukanumaa? Adhuvum kashtapadaama? Verum 15 days-la? Appo MySivi-yoda 15 days challenge-a start panunga. 2-3 days-la andha flow-va pudichiduveenga. 1 week practice paneenga na oru alavukku samaalikra confidence vandhudum. 2 weeks-la nalla dhairiyama pesa aarambichiduveenga. Nambalana Play Store, App Store reviews-laam kooda paarunga. Cheap'aana vazhi-la fast'aa English kathukanumna MySivi thaan thevai. Odanae install pannunga. [Want to learn English? Without struggling? In just 15 days? Then start MySivi's 15-day challenge. In 2-3 days, you'll catch the flow. With 1 week of practice, you'll get enough confidence to manage. In 2 weeks, you'll start speaking boldly. If you don't believe it, check the Play Store and App Store reviews. If you want to learn English fast and cheap, MySivi is what you need. Install now.] Speaker B: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: English kathukanumaa [Want to learn English?], padaama [without (struggling)], 15 Days, MySivi, start panunga [start], 2-3 days-la andha [In 2-3 days, that], flow va pudichiduveenga [you will catch the flow], 1 Week, practice, paneenga na oru [if you do, a], alavukku samaalikra [manageable], confidence, vandhudum [will come], 2 Weeks, pesa aarambichiduveenga [you will start speaking], Play Store 4.6, App Store 4.5, laam kooda paarunga [look at all those too], Cheap'aana vazhi [Cheap way], la fast'aa English [fast English], kathukanumna [if you want to learn], MySivi, thaan thevai [is what is needed], odanae [immediately], install, panunga [do], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI-generated baby skydiving promotes the MySivi English learning app in Tamil. The ad outlines a 15-day challenge to speak English confidently and highlights high app store ratings. It ends with a call to action to install the app.
